title: pinalia baniae
intro: Pinalia baniae, also known as the Banjei Pinalia or Banjai Pinalia, is a rare orchid species native to the forests of Sri Lanka and the Western Ghats in India. It is traditionally valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. In traditional herbal preparations, Pinalia baniae is often used to make decoctions or infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health ailments.
